semantic_dialog.evidence: Settings panel uses role=dialog, aria-modal=true, aria-labelledby, and aria-describedby.

focus_management.evidence: Visual smoke verified panel focus containment in 90/90 route-viewport checks and Escape close on the representative opening check.

keyboard_reachability.evidence: Segmented controls and reset are buttons/range input with accessible names and visible focus styles.

state_exposure.evidence: Controls retain aria-pressed selected state; screen-reader live copy summarizes current settings.

reset_behavior.evidence: Reset comfort defaults is visible in 90/90 smoke checks and restores sanitized defaults through readerSettings helpers.

reduced_motion.evidence: Reduced motion remains a visible setting and reader CSS respects reduced motion classes and media preference.
